privileged_info_summary: The add_layer_mask task is a GIMP image editing task requiring agents to add a white (full opacity) layer mask to a test image. The task uses real image data from Unsplash (not synthetic) - specifically photo-1560472354 (600x366 JPEG) as primary and photo-1518837695005 (600x400 JPEG) as secondary source, with ImageMagick-generated fallback. The environment is example.gimp_env@0.1 with 60-second timeout and maximum 5 steps. The verifier checks XCF file creation, layer mask presence, and proper mask configuration. All metadata claims are consistent with the task suite (144 total tasks, all version 1.0, all sparse reward type) and verified against actual file contents and Unsplash API responses.
